changes: Added SSH Identity Vault (Termius-style key management)

Assign identities to servers
Export public/private keys

Fixed mass assignment vulnerability in settings

Added server group dashboard
Added file manager for remote servers
Added firewall rules management (UFW/iptables)
Added real database storage for all settings
Added backup creation with progress bar and percentage display
Added WebSocket real-time backup progress updates
Added backup download and delete functionality
Fixed settings persistence (security, mail, backup settings)
Added database migration for settings, backups, and IP bans tables
Improved system logs viewer with file-based log reading
Fixed SSH credential update issue - username now visible when editing
Added dedicated addon panels with live status display
Fixed terminal scrolling issue with proper scrollback support
Added comprehensive Settings page with multiple sections
Added update checker with changelog display
Added API status monitoring and restart capability
Added Mail server configuration
Added 2FA and Fail2Ban security settings
Added backup management interface
Added system logs viewer
Added addon/plugin system for Cloudflare Tunnel, WireGuard, Docker, Fail2Ban
Improved log viewer with templates and auto-detection
Added version display in sidebar

Added SQL repair commands to update script
Added server groups with color coding

Added activity logging for all actions
